SEARCH
Package minum.htmlparsing

Record Class HtmlParseNode

java.lang.Object
java.lang.Record
minum.htmlparsing.HtmlParseNode
public record HtmlParseNode(ParseNodeType type, TagInfo tagInfo, List<HtmlParseNode> innerContent, String textContent) extends Record
These nodes represent the types of things we may encounter when parsing an HTML string, which for our purposes is just the types in ParseNodeType. Depending on the type, different values will be filled out, but by coalescing them into this one class, it simplifies our code. See W3.org Elements

    • EMPTY

      public static final HtmlParseNode EMPTY

  • Constructor Details

    • HtmlParseNode

      public HtmlParseNode(ParseNodeType type, TagInfo tagInfo, List<HtmlParseNode> innerContent, String textContent)
      Creates an instance of a HtmlParseNode record class.
      Parameters:
      type - the value for the type record component
      tagInfo - the value for the tagInfo record component
      innerContent - the value for the innerContent record component
      textContent - the value for the textContent record component

  • Method Details

    • print

      public List<String> print()
      This method traverses the tree from this node downwards, adding the text content as it goes.

    • searchOne

      public HtmlParseNode searchOne(TagName tagName, Map<String,String> attributes)
      This searches for a single node in the HTML. If it finds more than one match, it will throw an exception. If none are found, HtmlParseNode.EMPTY is returned.

    • innerText

      public String innerText()
      If the element you're looking at has just one inner content item, and it's a CHARACTERS element, return it.

    • toString

      public final String toString()
      Returns a string representation of this record class. The representation contains the name of the class, followed by the name and value of each of the record components.
      Specified by:
      toString in class Record
      Returns:
      a string representation of this object

    • hashCode

      public final int hashCode()
      Returns a hash code value for this object. The value is derived from the hash code of each of the record components.
      Specified by:
      hashCode in class Record
      Returns:
      a hash code value for this object

    • equals

      public final boolean equals(Object o)
      Indicates whether some other object is "equal to" this one. The objects are equal if the other object is of the same class and if all the record components are equal. All components in this record class are compared with Objects::equals(Object,Object).
      Specified by:
      equals in class Record
      Parameters:
      o - the object with which to compare
      Returns:
      true if this object is the same as the o argument; false otherwise.

      Returns the value of the type record component.
      Returns:
      the value of the type record component

      Returns the value of the tagInfo record component.

      Returns the value of the innerContent record component.

    • textContent

      public String textContent()
